pins.routing_note: MainBoard supports either dedicated or shared routing by stuffing, and the current selected design routes ERM I2C onto the shared STUSB4500/DAC bus.
MainBoard supports either dedicated or shared routing by stuffing, and the current selected design routes ERM I2C onto the shared STUSB4500/DAC bus.

notes_from_sheet: MainBoard page 4 now adds resistor-stuffing options that can move ERM_SDA/ERM_SCL onto a shared I2C controller with STUSB4500 and DAC.
Current selected design uses the shared-bus stuffing option.
